name: Enlightenment Classical
description: Classical works from the Age of Reason — Mozart, Beethoven, Haydn, and their contemporaries who composed during the Enlightenment.

name: Focus & Deep Reading
description: Instrumental ambient music for concentrated reading and study — no lyrics, no distractions.

name: Philosophical Folk
description: Folk and acoustic music that asks big questions — Leonard Cohen, Bob Dylan, Joni Mitchell, and modern inheritors.
